docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OCHOA, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT COASTSIDE CLEAN ENERGY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCHOA, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT COASTSIDE CLEAN ENERGY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COASTSIDE CLEAN ENERGY
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-01-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SALVADOR OCHOA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COASTSIDE CLEAN ENERGY IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE - PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCHOA, SALVADOR

STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OCHOA, SALVADOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF SALVADOR OCHOA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COASTSIDE CLEAN ENERGY IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCHOA, SALVADOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COASTSIDE CLEAN ENERGY $1,098.93 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,188.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
